purpose: Shinobi is an autonomous Windows-native agent designed for Spanish-speaking YouTubers, providing tools for content adaptation and automation.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and build setup.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Details project purpose, installation steps, and development setup.

concerns: No tests are specified in the package.json file, raising concerns about coverage.
README states certain elements are 'closed' but does not specify detailed testing procedures.
The author is listed as 'AngelReml' without further context or contact.
The project aims to serve a specific demographic, may limit broader usability.
The build process for the distributable .exe lacks thorough documentation on handling production.

purpose: Manages the release notifications from the upstream Hermes repository using GitHub's API.
concerns: No unit tests for critical functions like `checkOnce` and `renderNotice`.
Potential failure in network requests to GitHub API without proper handling.
State file path management might lead to persistence issues if not handled correctly.
Error handling could be improved to better indicate the source of failures.

purpose: This folder contains scripts for testing and running parts of the application involving reading arguments and generating reports.

key_files.name: a4_run.ts
key_files.role: Runs the read function on specified repositories and generates reports.

key_files.name: b1_diff_run.ts
key_files.role: Executes self-diff check and exits based on success.

concerns: A4 run script appends raw dumps without evaluating them.
Error handling silently ignored when reading report and subreport files in a4_run.ts.
No unit tests for the runSelfDiff function in b1_diff_run.ts.
Temporary files created in b1_smoke.ts are not cleaned up on error.
Test output in console does not include failure details in a3_smoke.ts.

purpose: Documentation for the Shinobi ecosystem, detailing identity, architecture, roadmap, current state, and pending tasks.

key_files.name: 00_identity.md
key_files.role: Describes the identity, work style, and preferences of the author.

key_files.name: 01_ecosystem.md
key_files.role: Outlines the architecture, components, and operational flow of the Shinobi ecosystem.

key_files.name: 02_roadmap.md
key_files.role: Details the roadmap and phases for commercial product development and capabilities.

key_files.name: 03_state.md
key_files.role: Summarizes current operational status and features of the Shinobi CLI and OpenGravity.

key_files.name: 04_pending.md
key_files.role: Tracks closed and open technical issues and pending tasks.

concerns: Several tasks are pending publication; no posts have been made yet.
Cloudflare Turnstile issue is noted but considered out of current scope.
Some roadmap phases are incomplete; calls for human decision-making.
Documentation on pending technical issues needs to be addressed.
Manual publication workflow slows down visibility on updates.

purpose: Holds raw data extracted from a specific YouTube video including navigated URL and content.
Contains various reports, configurations, and demos for managing Shinobi's functionalities.
concerns: Several audits highlight high and medium risks due to lack of tests and documentation.
Mission reports indicate potential for errors in network and file operations handling.
Demo transcripts show several successful task executions but lack detailed descriptions of failures.
Audit reports have unreadable sections, indicating possible hidden risks.
Outdated dependencies in some audit reports raise maintenance concerns.
